narrative: New account opened with documents later found to be fraudulently obtained; immediate high-value transaction shortly after onboarding.
analyst_notes: Confirmed Identity Theft after review; account restricted and SAR filed.

narrative: Login from an unrecognized device and geography preceded a password reset and same-day high-value transfer, consistent with account takeover.
analyst_notes: Confirmed Account Takeover after review; account restricted and SAR filed.

narrative: Account received multiple rapid inbound transfers from unrelated third parties, followed by immediate outbound wire to a newly added external account, consistent with a money mule pattern.
analyst_notes: Confirmed Mule Account after review; account restricted and SAR filed.

narrative: Customer made a series of increasing wire transfers to a new international payee developed through an online relationship, matching known romance scam indicators.
analyst_notes: Confirmed Romance Scam after review; account restricted and SAR filed.
